title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS Developers presents five production deployment best practices for AI agents: streaming tool call events for UI responsiveness, layered authentication with API Gateway and Cognito, type-safe contracted database access with tenant isolation, guardrails with cost budgets and model routing, and observability through metrics and OpenTelemetry tracing. Patterns are demonstrated on AWS services but claimed to be generally applicable.
